simple_types.name: Secret_Key
simple_types.code: type Secret_Key (Length : Key_Length) is limited private;

tagged_types.name: Decoder
tagged_types.code: type Decoder is tagged limited private;

tagged_types.name: Encoder
tagged_types.code: type Encoder is tagged limited private;

access_types.name: Transformer_Access
access_types.code: type Transformer_Access is access all Transformer'Class;

subtypes.name: Key_Length
subtypes.code: subtype Key_Length is Stream_Element_Offset range 1 .. Stream_Element_Offset'Last;

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (Name : in String) return Decoder

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (Name : in String) return Encoder

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code: function Create (Password : in String) return Secret_Key

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code:
procedure Create (Password : in Stream_Element_Array;
                  Key      : out Secret_Key)

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code:
procedure Create (Password : in String;
                  Key      : out Secret_Key)

subprograms.name: Decode
subprograms.code:
function Decode (E    : in Decoder;
                 Data : in String) return String

subprograms.name: Decode_Binary
subprograms.code:
function Decode_Binary (E    : in Decoder;
                        Data : in String) return Ada.Streams.Stream_Element_Array

subprograms.name: Decode_Key
subprograms.code:
function Decode_Key (E    : in Decoder'Class;
                     Data : in String) return Secret_Key

subprograms.name: Decode_LEB128
Encode
subprograms.code:
function Encode (E    : in Encoder;
                 Data : in String) return String

subprograms.name: Encode_Binary
subprograms.code:
function Encode_Binary (E    : in Encoder;
                        Data : in Ada.Streams.Stream_Element_Array) return String

subprograms.name: Encode_LEB128
Encode_Unsigned_16
subprograms.code:
function Encode_Unsigned_16 (E     : in Encoder;
                             Value : in Interfaces.Unsigned_16) return String

subprograms.name: Encode_Unsigned_32
subprograms.code:
function Encode_Unsigned_32 (E     : in Encoder;
                             Value : in Interfaces.Unsigned_32) return String

subprograms.name: Encode_Unsigned_64
subprograms.code:
function Encode_Unsigned_64 (E     : in Encoder;
                             Value : in Interfaces.Unsigned_64) return String

subprograms.name: Finish
Transform
Transform
subprograms.code:
function Transform (E    : in out Transformer'Class;
                    Data : in Ada.Streams.Stream_Element_Array) return String

subprograms.name: Transform
subprograms.code:
function Transform (E    : in out Transformer'Class;
                    Data : in String) return String
